channel.name: andyrewlee / awesome-agent-orchestrators
channel.contact_source: public mailto on https://www.checkfu.com tied to maintainer Andrew Lee ecosystem links
channel.subject: Suggested awesome-agent-orchestrators listing: Ralph Workflow

submitted_payload.suggested_entry: Ralph Workflow — free and open-source workflow layer for autonomous coding that composes planning, implementation, and verification so unattended runs end in something reviewable instead of another confident summary.

why_this_action: Shared findings still show distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion as the live bottleneck, Codeberg adoption is flat, Apollo is already in a measurement window until 2026-05-30, and Reddit is structurally weak. awesome-agent-orchestrators is an active high-fit curator surface with 500+ stars and a directly relevant coding-agent audience, so a Codeberg-primary curator outreach there was the highest-leverage untouched action available right now.
shared_findings_reused: MARKETING_WORKFLOW_PRINCIPLES.md: prioritize Codeberg-first distribution and proof-led positioning
FOUR_MARKETING_QUESTIONS.md: preserved what it is, who it is for, why different, why now
ADOPTION_FUNNEL_NEXT.md: current need is qualified traffic plus stronger free-use framing
adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg remains flat and is still the primary success gate
market_intelligence_latest.json: reused canonical positioning truths and orchestration framing
reddit_post_analysis.json: Reddit remains structurally weak and repetitive, so this run avoided that lane
outreach-log.md: verified this target had not already been contacted
curator_outreach_queue_latest.json: prepared targets were exhausted, so this run expanded the queue with a fresh curator surface

measurement_window.success_signal: reply, merged listing, or another qualified backlink path that sends evaluators to the Codeberg primary repo
measurement_window.kill_condition: If no reply or inclusion signal arrives by 2026-06-06, retire this target and move to a different untouched curator surface instead of re-sending the same pitch.
